title: Admission Open for 2025-26
content: Applications are now open for the academic year 2025-26. Last date to apply: June 30, 2025.

title: Annual Sports Day - April 15
content: The Annual Sports Day will be held on April 15, 2025. All students are encouraged to participate.

title: Exam Schedule Released
content: The final examination schedule for semester IV has been released. Check the notice board for details.

title: Workshop on AI & Machine Learning
content: A two-day workshop on AI and Machine Learning will be conducted on April 20-21. Register before April 10.

title: Independence Day Celebration
content: College will celebrate Independence Day on August 15. Cultural events and flag hoisting at 8:00 AM.
